# terrible_cisco_dnac_user_role_workflow_manager (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String) A dictionary containing the configuration details for users or roles.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `config_verify` (Boolean) Set to True to verify the Cisco Catalyst Center after applying the playbook config.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The state of Cisco Catalyst Center after module completion.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `response_1` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution from Cisco Catalyst Center.
- `response_10` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution and error information.
- `response_11` (String) A dictionary indicating role not found during delete operation.
- `response_2` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution from Cisco Catalyst Center.
- `response_3` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution from Cisco Catalyst Center.
- `response_4` (String) A dictionary with existing user details indicating no update needed.
- `response_5` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution and error information.
- `response_6` (String) A dictionary indicating user not found during delete operation.
- `response_7` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution from Cisco Catalyst Center.
- `response_8` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution from Cisco Catalyst Center.
- `response_9` (String) A dictionary with details of the API execution from Cisco Catalyst Center.
